title: LIDAR Micro Drone With Proximity Sensing
description: 250 mm quadcopter with TFMini-S downward LIDAR for altitude hold and 4× VL53L1X TOF sensors for 360° proximity/obstacle avoidance, running Betaflight F4 with MSP LIDAR integration.
objective: Stable altitude hold ±5 cm via LIDAR; obstacle avoidance < 30 cm in 4 directions; 5 min hover flight time; < 250 g AUW.
constraints: 4S LiPo 650 mAh; Betaflight F4 FC; BOM < ₹6000; < 250 g AUW.
supporting_fact_titles: LIDAR Time-of-Flight — Point Cloud Distance Measurement
design_element_titles: LIDAR Micro Drone — Proximity Sensing and Altitude Hold
Cascaded PID Rate and Attitude Controller

element_usage_notes.LIDAR Micro Drone — Proximity Sensing an: TFMini-S on FC UART2 for altitude hold; 4× VL53L1X via TCA9548A for proximity.
element_usage_notes.TFMini-S Single-Point LiDAR Distance Sen: Betaflight altitude hold mode reads LIDAR via MSP on UART2.
